test.note: swell-validation: 401 tests passed, 1 ignored. Full workspace test has known environmental pollution issue with test_five_layer_precedence_ordering when run in parallel - passes in isolation.

reviewsSummary.note: Round 2 reviews only the fix feature for the prior round's blocking issue. All other features (val-mutation-testing, val-test-planning, val-failure-classification, val-flakiness-scoring, val-property-based-gen, val-autonomous-coverage, val-traceability-chain) were reviewed in round 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add documentation for new public types in swell-validation: AutonomousCoverageLoop, CoverageLoopIteration, CoverageLoopResult, and AutonomousCoverageLoopConfig. Currently only AutonomousCoverageEngine is documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature val-autonomous-coverage review found these types are exported from lib.rs but not documented in AGENTS.md
